title: Dark Shield
description: Darkens the shield's texture to match netherite. Pairs perfectly with netherite armor.
body:
## Dark Shield
A resource pack that changes the default shield texture, making it significantly darker. The new design mimics the color and rugged appearance of netherite, giving your gear a more menacing, cohesive, and stylish look.

---

**Features:**
- Stylistic Cohesion: The shield visually matches your netherite armor.
- Menacing Appearance: The dark palette makes your appearance more imposing in PvP or against mobs.
- Compatibility: Works with all shield types (basic, patterned) and other resource packs.
